body_excerpt: In listen() and related functions of TelephonyRegistry.java, there is a possible permissions bypass of location permissions due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In listen() and related functions of TelephonyRegistry.java, there is a possible permissions bypass of location permissions due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local information disc
